name: Gdi Property Group
analysis: GDI's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.6300, stop A$0.6039, target A$0.7083 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
